blocker_categories.none: No active QEMU serial smoke blocker remains.
blocker_categories.limine_not_reached: QEMU serial evidence did not show Limine reachability.
blocker_categories.kernel_not_loaded: Limine did not load the KOZO kernel ELF.
blocker_categories.kernel_entry_not_reached: Limine reported kernel entry evidence but KOZO entry marker was absent.
blocker_categories.serial_not_initialized: KOZO entry was observed but serial initialization completion was absent.
blocker_categories.marker_not_emitted: Early serial initialization was observed but the boot smoke marker was absent.
blocker_categories.stack_marker_not_emitted: The boot smoke marker was observed but the stack initialization marker was absent.
blocker_categories.memory_marker_not_emitted: The stack initialization marker was observed but the memory initialization marker was absent.
blocker_categories.runtime_progression_entry_not_reached: Memory initialization evidence was observed but runtime progression entry was absent.
blocker_categories.runtime_initialization_not_proven: Runtime progression entry was observed but Odin runtime initialization evidence was absent.
blocker_categories.runtime_return_not_reached: Odin runtime initialization evidence was observed but the governed return marker was absent.
blocker_categories.qemu_timeout: QEMU execution timed out before a passing smoke sequence was observed.
blocker_categories.missing_boot_image: The QEMU smoke script cannot find the boot image.
blocker_categories.missing_iso_generation_tooling: Local Limine or ISO generation tooling is unavailable.
blocker_categories.missing_qemu_serial_evidence: QEMU serial evidence has not been captured.
blocker_categories.missing_load_segments: Kernel ELF load segments are missing.
blocker_categories.invalid_kernel_entry: Kernel ELF entry point is invalid.
blocker_categories.limine_lower_half_phdr: Limine rejected lower-half kernel ELF program headers.
